name: akbun-cardnews
description: Korean card news (cover + content pages) copy, image-generation prompts, and Figma/Canva-ready SVG

interface.shortDescription: Korean SNS card news copy, image prompts, and SVG
interface.longDescription: Turns a topic, text, or reference images into Korean SNS card news: per-page copy (cover + content pages), English prompts for image-generation AI agents, and editable 1080x1350 SVG files that import into Figma or Canva.
defaultPrompt: Make Korean card news (copy, image prompts, and Figma/Canva SVG) from this topic
